name: example-mutating-mcp
description: Explicit opt-in template for an MCP server that can perform side effects.
requiredOperatorChecks: Confirm credentials are stored outside tracked files.
Confirm the target system and blast radius are understood.
Prefer a disposable or test environment before production use.
notes: Use this only when the workflow genuinely needs side effects.
Mutating MCP configs should usually stay local-only even if a read-only sample is tracked.
